cases.label: happy_path

input.value_score_card: short_term high; visit likelihood high; conversion depends on budget, slot, and vehicle-scope completion
contact_history: 刚从小红书评论区转私信

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_assessment: A- 级第一次到店线索，用户说自己担心不会看车，但这周末有空想先来看看。

contact_history: 用户已表示这周末有空
看过门店和检测流程内容

cases.label: long_term_case
